case_title: DAMDINM YAGMAR DUZIIMAA VS. VICTOR BLANDON ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-18-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DAMDINM YAGMAR DUZIMAA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR BLANDON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TOMMY MIGN NGUYEN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WOULD NOT DISMISS HIS CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT VICTOR BLANDON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
